name: Homemade Tarter Sauce (Fpnv92b)
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the green onions, sweet pickles, dill pickle, and garlic finely in a food processor.
2. Do not puree the mixture.
3. Add the lemon juice, Worcestershire sauce, Tobasco sauce, and mayonnaise to the chopped vegetables.
4. Mix well until all ingredients are thoroughly combined.
5. Refrigerate the tarter sauce mixture.
6. Store in an airtight container for several weeks.
